#!/usr/bin/env python3 # -*- coding: utf-8 -*- import os import json import re from typing import List, Dict, Any, Set, Tuple # ---- 关键环境变量 ---- os.environ.setdefault("VLLM_WORKER_MULTIPROC_METHOD", "spawn") os.environ.setdefault("TOKENIZERS_PARALLELISM", "false") from PIL import Image import re from tqdm import tqdm from transformers import AutoProcessor from qwen_vl_utils import process_vision_info from vllm import LLM, SamplingParams # ========================= # 配置区：按需改 # ========================= # 统一图片读取根目录（不再使用 image_parent_dir） IMAGE_ROOT = "/mnt/shared-storage-gpfs2/intern-pretrain-shared02/wangbingli/interleaved-image-text/data/pngs" # 你额外指定的图片目录 DATA_PATH = "/mnt/shared-storage-gpfs2/intern-pretrain-shared02/wangbingli/interleaved-image-text/data/jsonls_interleved_format_image_sequence_filter/image_counts_no_less_than_2/split4.jsonl" # 你的 jsonl OUTPUT_ROOT = "./outputs" # 输出根目录 MODEL_PATH = "/mnt/shared-storage-gpfs2/intern-pretrain-shared02/wangbingli/code/EasyR1/checkpoints-4B/easy_r1/qwen3_vl_8b_gspo_ITA/global_step_195/actor/huggingface" TENSOR_PARALLEL = 1 GPU_MEM_UTIL = 0.9 MAX_MODEL_LEN = 32768 BATCH_SIZE = 2048 MAX_TOKENS = 8196 # 本页作为候选的文本块类型（可按你需要增删） CAND_TEXT_TYPES = { "header", "title", "text", "image_caption", "table_caption", "table_footnote", "ref_text", "page_footnote", } # 保存策略：ANSWER:None 的图是否仍然落盘 SAVE_EMPTY = False # True: 也创建 img 子目录并保存空 related_texts # ========================= # Prompt：与你给的版本对齐（最小改动） # ========================= _TEXT_ID_RE = re.compile(r"(\d+)") def _text_key(tid: str) -> int: m = _TEXT_ID_RE.search(tid or "") return int(m.group(1)) if m else 0 def build_prompt(candidates: List[Dict[str, str]]) -> str: candidates_sorted = sorted(candidates, key=lambda x: _text_key(x.get("id", ""))) num_segments = len(candidates_sorted) lines: List[str] = [] lines.append("") lines.append( f"You are given ONE image and {num_segments} candidate text segments (TEXT1 to TEXT{num_segments}).\n" "Each text segment should be evaluated INDEPENDENTLY.\n\n" "For EACH text segment:\n" "- Decide whether it is semantically related to the image or not.\n" "- Explain clearly and concretely WHY it is related or NOT related,\n" " explicitly referring to visible objects, actions, scenes, or attributes in the image.\n" ) for c in candidates_sorted: tid = c.get("id", "") content = " ".join((c.get("text", "") or "").split()) lines.append(f"{tid}: {content}") lines.append("") lines.append( "Your output must strictly follow the rules below:\n\n" "1. Write ONE short paragraph for EACH text segment (TEXT1, TEXT2, ..., TEXTN),\n" " explaining whether and why it is semantically related or NOT related to the image.\n" " - Base your explanation only on the visual content of the image.\n" " - Do NOT mention labels, annotations, ground truth, or training data.\n\n" "2. After ALL explanations, output EXACTLY ONE final line in ONE of the following formats:\n\n" " ANSWER:TEXTi; TEXTj; TEXTk\n" " (list ALL and ONLY the related text segments, separated by '; ', in ascending order)\n\n" " OR, if none of the text segments are related:\n\n" " ANSWER:None\n\n" "3. Do NOT add any extra text after the ANSWER line.\n" "4. Do NOT provide a global image caption.\n" "5. Do NOT explain your decision strategy or reasoning process explicitly." ) return "\n".join(lines) def build_messages(image: Image.Image, prompt: str) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]: return [{ "role": "user", "content": [ {"type": "image", "image": image}, {"type": "text", "text": prompt}, ] }] # ========================= # 解析：按页取文本候选 & 图片列表 # ========================= def load_jsonl(path: str) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]: data = [] with open(path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f: for line in f: line = line.strip() if line: data.append(json.loads(line)) return data def extract_page_candidates(page_blocks: List[Dict[str, Any]]) -> List[Dict[str, str]]: texts: List[str] = [] for blk in page_blocks: t = blk.get("type") if t in CAND_TEXT_TYPES: content = blk.get("content") if isinstance(content, str) and content.strip(): texts.append(content.strip()) candidates = [{"id": f"TEXT{i+1}", "text": txt} for i, txt in enumerate(texts)] return candidates def extract_page_image_paths(page_middle: Dict[str, Any]) -> List[str]: """ 从 middle_jsons[page_i].para_blocks 提取 image_path，按出现顺序。 """ paths: List[str] = [] for pb in page_middle.get("para_blocks", []): if pb.get("type") != "image": continue for b in pb.get("blocks", []): for ln in b.get("lines", []): for sp in ln.get("spans", []): if sp.get("type") == "image" and sp.get("image_path"): paths.append(sp["image_path"]) break return paths # ========================= # ANSWER 解析 # ========================= _TEXT_TOKEN_RE = re.compile(r"TEXT\d+", re.IGNORECASE) def parse_answer_set(model_text: str) -> Set[str]: if not model_text: return set() lines = model_text.strip().splitlines() last = lines[-1].strip() if lines else "" if not last.lower().startswith("answer:"): return set() payload = last.split(":", 1)[1].strip() if payload.lower() in {"none", "null", "nil"}: return set() return {t.upper() for t in _TEXT_TOKEN_RE.findall(payload)} # ========================= # 样本构建：pdf -> page -> images # ========================= def build_samples_from_record(rec: Dict[str, Any]) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]: """ 返回的每个 sample 对应 “一张图 + 本页所有候选文本” """ sha256 = rec.get("sha256") or "unknown_pdf" pdf_id = sha256 # 一级目录名：一个 pdf 一个子目录（建议用 sha256） chosen_pages = rec.get("chosen_pages_indices") or [] model_pages = (((rec.get("score_res") or {}).get("metric_info") or {}).get("model_output_json")) or [] middle_pages = rec.get("middle_jsons") or [] # 不再从 image_parent_dir 读取图片 img_root = IMAGE_ROOT n_pages = min(len(chosen_pages), len(model_pages), len(middle_pages)) if n_pages == 0: return [] all_samples: List[Dict[str, Any]] = [] for page_i in range(n_pages): page_no = chosen_pages[page_i] # 真实页号 page_blocks = model_pages[page_i] page_middle = middle_pages[page_i] candidates = extract_page_candidates(page_blocks) if len(candidates) == 0: continue prompt = build_prompt(candidates) img_paths = extract_page_image_paths(page_middle) if len(img_paths) == 0: continue for k, rel_path in enumerate(img_paths): img_path = os.path.join(img_root, rel_path) all_samples.append({ "pdf_id": pdf_id, "page_no": page_no, "img_idx": k, "img_path": img_path, "prompt": prompt, "candidates": candidates, }) return all_samples # ========================= # 推理（批量） # ========================= def run_batch_inference(llm: LLM, processor: AutoProcessor, samples: List[Dict[str, Any]]) -> List[str]: sampling_params = SamplingParams( temperature=0.0, top_p=1.0, max_tokens=MAX_TOKENS, ) outputs_all: List[str] = [] for s in tqdm(range(0, len(samples), BATCH_SIZE), desc="Batch inference"): batch = samples[s:s+BATCH_SIZE] vllm_inputs = [] for item in batch: img_path = item["img_path"] image = Image.open(img_path).convert("RGB") messages = build_messages(image, item["prompt"]) chat_text = processor.apply_chat_template( messages, tokenize=False, add_generation_prompt=True ) imgs, _= process_vision_info(messages) vllm_inputs.append({ "prompt": chat_text, "multi_modal_data": {"image": imgs} }) outs = llm.generate(vllm_inputs, sampling_params=sampling_params) for o in outs: outputs_all.append(o.outputs[0].text) return outputs_all # ========================= # 保存：三层目录 # ========================= def ensure_dir(p: str): os.makedirs(p, exist_ok=True) def save_one(sample: Dict[str, Any], response: str): pdf_id = sample["pdf_id"] page_no = sample["page_no"] img_idx = sample["img_idx"] img_path = sample["img_path"] selected_ids = sorted(parse_answer_set(response), key=_text_key) if (not selected_ids) and (not SAVE_EMPTY): return # 三级目录 pdf_dir = os.path.join(OUTPUT_ROOT, pdf_id) page_dir = os.path.join(pdf_dir, f"page_{page_no:04d}") img_dir = os.path.join(page_dir, f"img_{img_idx:04d}") ensure_dir(img_dir) # 保存图片 ext = os.path.splitext(img_path)[1].lower() or ".jpg" out_img = os.path.join(img_dir, f"image{ext}") Image.open(img_path).convert("RGB").save(out_img) # 过滤出相关文本 id2text = {c["id"]: c["text"] for c in sample["candidates"]} related = [{"id": tid, "text": id2text.get(tid, "")} for tid in selected_ids if tid in id2text] # 保存相关文本（json + txt） with open(os.path.join(img_dir, "related_texts.json"), "w", encoding="utf-8") as f: json.dump(related, f, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) with open(os.path.join(img_dir, "related_texts.txt"), "w", encoding="utf-8") as f: for r in related: f.write(f"{r['id']}: {r['text']}\n") # 可选：保存 response / prompt 便于排查 with open(os.path.join(img_dir, "response.txt"), "w", encoding="utf-8") as f: f.write(response.strip() + "\n") # 如果你不想保存 prompt，可以注释掉 with open(os.path.join(img_dir, "prompt.txt"), "w", encoding="utf-8") as f: f.write(sample["prompt"]) def main(): ensure_dir(OUTPUT_ROOT) print("Loading dataset...") records = load_jsonl(DATA_PATH) print(f"Total records (pdf): {len(records)}") print("Building samples (pdf->page->image)...") samples: List[Dict[str, Any]] = [] for rec in records: samples.extend(build_samples_from_record(rec)) print(f"Total image samples: {len(samples)}") if not samples: print("No samples. Exit.") return processor = AutoProcessor.from_pretrained(MODEL_PATH, trust_remote_code=True) llm = LLM( model=MODEL_PATH, trust_remote_code=True, tensor_parallel_size=TENSOR_PARALLEL, gpu_memory_utilization=GPU_MEM_UTIL, max_model_len=MAX_MODEL_LEN, ) print("Running inference...") responses = run_batch_inference(llm, processor, samples) print("Saving outputs...") for s, r in zip(samples, responses): save_one(s, r) print("DONE.") if **name** == "__main__": main() 这时我的处理代码，然后请你根据输出，帮我写一个精美的前段可视化data review界面，我已经写了一个框架： #!/usr/bin/env python3 # -*- coding: utf-8 -*- """ Visualization tool for model outputs. """ import os import re import json import html from pathlib import Path from collections import defaultdict from typing import Dict, List, Set, Any, Tuple # ========================= # 配置区 # ========================= # 必须与推理脚本的 OUTPUT_ROOT 保持一致 OUTPUT_ROOT = "./outputs" VIS_DIR_NAME = "vis_pro" # 生成可视化的子目录名 # ========================= # 解析逻辑 # ========================= def parse_prompt_candidates(prompt_text: str) -> Dict[str, str]: """ 从 prompt.txt 中解析出 {TEXT_ID: Original_Content}。 假设 Prompt 格式: TEXT1: ... TEXT2: ... ... Your output must strictly... """ candidates = {} lines = prompt_text.splitlines() # 简单的状态机，提取 TEXTn 开头的行，直到遇到指令部分 for line in lines: line = line.strip() if not line: continue # 停止条件：遇到指令区的关键词 if line.startswith("You are given") or line.startswith("Your output must"): continue # 匹配 TEXTn: content match = re.match(r"^(TEXT\d+):\s*(.*)", line) if match: tid = match.group(1) content = match.group(2) candidates[tid] = content return candidates def parse_model_response(response_text: str) -> Dict[str, str]: """ 从 response.txt 中解析出 {TEXT_ID: Reasoning}。 模型通常输出一段一段的解释。 """ reasoning = {} # 移除最后的 ANSWER 行 text_body = re.sub(r"ANSWER:.*", "", response_text, flags=re.DOTALL | re.IGNORECASE) # 尝试分割段落。模型通常输出 "TEXT1: ... \n\n TEXT2: ..." 或直接分段 # 这里使用正则查找所有 "TEXTn" 出现的位置 pattern = re.compile(r"(TEXT\d+)(?::|\s+is\s+related|\s+is\s+not)(.*?)", re.DOTALL) # { pdf_id: { page_no: [ {img_path, candidates, reasoning, answer_set, ...} ] } } pdf_dirs = sorted([d for d in root.iterdir() if d.is_dir() and d.name != VIS_DIR_NAME]) total_imgs = 0 for pdf_dir in pdf_dirs: pdf_id = pdf_dir.name dataset[pdf_id] = defaultdict(list) # 读取 Prompt (获取原文) candidates = {} prompt_path = img_dir / "prompt.txt" if prompt_path.exists(): candidates = parse_prompt_candidates(prompt_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8")) # 读取 Response (获取推理) reasoning = {} resp_path = img_dir / "response.txt" raw_response = "" if resp_path.exists(): raw_response = resp_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8") reasoning = parse_model_response(raw_response) # 读取 Result answer_set = get_final_answer_set(img_dir) # 为了防止 Prompt 解析失败导致 TEXT ID 缺失， # 补全 candidates 键值（至少显示 ID） all_ids = set(candidates.keys()) | set(reasoning.keys()) | answer_set # 排序 TEXT1, TEXT2... sorted_ids = sorted(list(all_ids), key=lambda x: int(re.search(r"\d+", x).group()) if re.search(r"\d+", x) else 999) dataset[pdf_id][page_no].append({ "rel_img_path": os.path.relpath(img_file, root), "candidates": candidates, "reasoning": reasoning, "answer_set": answer_set, "sorted_ids": sorted_ids, "raw_response": raw_response, "img_name": img_dir.name }) total_imgs += 1 return dataset, total_imgs # def parse_prompt_candidates(prompt_text: str) -> Dict[str, str]:
    candidates = {}
    lines = prompt_text.splitlines()
    for line in lines:
        line = line.strip()
        if not line or line.startswith("You are given") or line.startswith("Your output must"):
            continue
        match = re.match(r"^(TEXT\d+):\s*(.*)", line)
        if match:
            candidates[match.group(1)] = match.group(2)
    return candidates

def parse_model_response(response_text: str) -> Dict[str, str]:
    reasoning = {}
    text_body = re.sub(r"ANSWER:.*", "", response_text, flags=re.DOTALL | re.IGNORECASE)
    tokens = re.split(r"(TEXT\d+)", text_body)
    current_id = None
    for token in tokens:
        token = token.strip()
        if not token: continue
        if re.match(r"^TEXT\d+$", token):
            current_id = token
        else:
            if current_id:
                reasoning[current_id] = re.sub(r"^[:\-\.]\s*", "", token)
                current_id = None
    return reasoning

def get_final_answer_set(img_dir: Path) -> Set[str]:
    json_path = img_dir / "related_texts.json"
    s = set()
    if json_path.exists():
        try:
            data = json.load(open(json_path, "r", encoding="utf-8"))
            for item in data:
                if "id" in item: s.add(item["id"])
        except: pass
    return s

def scan_dataset(root: Path):
    dataset = {} 
    total_imgs = 0
    pdf_dirs = sorted([d for d in root.iterdir() if d.is_dir() and d.name not in [VIS_DIR_NAME, "vis", "vis_pro"]])
    
    for pdf_dir in pdf_dirs:
        pdf_id = pdf_dir.name
        dataset[pdf_id] = defaultdict(list)
        page_dirs = sorted(pdf_dir.glob("page_*"))
        for page_dir in page_dirs:
            page_no = page_dir.name
            img_dirs = sorted(page_dir.glob("img_*"))
            for img_dir in img_dirs:
                img_file = next((img_dir / f"image{ext}" for ext in [".jpg", ".png", ".jpeg"] if (img_dir/f"image{ext}").exists()), None)
                if not img_file: continue
                
                candidates = {}
                if (img_dir / "prompt.txt").exists():
                    candidates = parse_prompt_candidates((img_dir / "prompt.txt").read_text(encoding="utf-8", errors='ignore'))
                
                reasoning = {}
                raw_response = ""
                if (img_dir / "response.txt").exists():
                    raw_response = (img_dir / "response.txt").read_text(encoding="utf-8", errors='ignore')
                    reasoning = parse_model_response(raw_response)
                
                answer_set = get_final_answer_set(img_dir)
                all_ids = set(candidates.keys()) | set(reasoning.keys()) | answer_set
                sorted_ids = sorted(list(all_ids), key=lambda x: int(re.search(r"\d+", x).group()) if re.search(r"\d+", x) else 999)

                dataset[pdf_id][page_no].append({
                    "rel_img_path": os.path.relpath(img_file, root),
                    "candidates": candidates,
                    "reasoning": reasoning,
                    "answer_set": answer_set,
                    "sorted_ids": sorted_ids,
                    "raw_response": raw_response,
                    "img_name": img_dir.name
                })
                total_imgs += 1
    return dataset, total_imgs

JS_SCRIPT = """
<script>
    // --- Pan & Zoom Engine ---
    class ImageViewer {
        constructor(el) {
            this.container = el;
            this.content = el.querySelector('.pan-zoom-container');
            this.scale = 1;
            this.panning = false;
            this.pointX = 0;
            this.pointY = 0;
            this.startX = 0;
            this.startY = 0;

            this.initEvents();
        }

        initEvents() {
            // Wheel Zoom
            this.container.addEventListener('wheel', (e) => {
                e.preventDefault();
                const xs = (e.clientX - this.pointX) / this.scale;
                const ys = (e.clientY - this.pointY) / this.scale;
                
                const delta = -e.deltaY;
                const factor = delta > 0 ? 1.1 : 0.9;
                
                let newScale = this.scale * factor;
                if (newScale < 0.5) newScale = 0.5;
                if (newScale > 5) newScale = 5;

                this.pointX = e.clientX - xs * newScale;
                this.pointY = e.clientY - ys * newScale;
                this.scale = newScale;

                this.update();
            });

            // Pan
            this.container.addEventListener('mousedown', (e) => {
                this.panning = true;
                this.startX = e.clientX - this.pointX;
                this.startY = e.clientY - this.pointY;
                this.container.style.cursor = 'grabbing';
            });

            window.addEventListener('mouseup', () => {
                this.panning = false;
                this.container.style.cursor = 'grab';
            });

            window.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {
                if (!this.panning) return;
                e.preventDefault();
                this.pointX = e.clientX - this.startX;
                this.pointY = e.clientY - this.startY;
                this.update();
            });
        }

        zoomIn() {
            this.scale *= 1.2;
            this.update();
        }

        zoomOut() {
            this.scale /= 1.2;
            if(this.scale < 0.5) this.scale = 0.5;
            this.update();
        }

        reset() {
            this.scale = 1;
            this.pointX = 0;
            this.pointY = 0;
            this.update();
        }

        update() {
            this.content.style.transform = `translate(${this.pointX}px, ${this.pointY}px) scale(${this.scale})`;
        }
    }

    // Initialize
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
        const stage = document.querySelector('.image-stage');
        if(stage) {
            const viewer = new ImageViewer(stage);
            window.viewer = viewer; // expose to global for buttons
        }

        // Keyboard Nav
        document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
            if (e.key === 'ArrowRight') {
                const btn = document.getElementById('btn-next');
                if(btn && !btn.classList.contains('disabled')) btn.click();
            }
            if (e.key === 'ArrowLeft') {
                const btn = document.getElementById('btn-prev');
                if(btn && !btn.classList.contains('disabled')) btn.click();
            }
        });
    });
</script>

    for pdf_id, pages in dataset.items():
        n_pages = len(pages)

    vis_root.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

    if not dataset:
        print("❌ No data found.")
        return

    print("🎨 Generating Ultimate UI...")
    generate_index_html(dataset, total_imgs, vis_root)
    
    for pdf_id, pages in dataset.items():
        pdf_dir = vis_root / pdf_id
        pdf_dir.mkdir(exist_ok=True)
        sorted_pages = sorted(pages.keys())
        
        # Build Navigation Data for this PDF
        nav_data = []
        for p in sorted_pages:
            has_match = any(len(x['answer_set']) > 0 for x in pages[p])
            nav_data.append({
                'pdf': pdf_id, 'page': p, 'rel_link': f"{p}.html",
                'img_count': len(pages[p]), 'has_match': has_match
            })
            
        for i, page_no in enumerate(sorted_pages):
            prev_link = f"{sorted_pages[i-1]}.html" if i > 0 else "#"
            next_link = f"{sorted_pages[i+1]}.html" if i < len(sorted_pages)-1 else "#"
            
            generate_page_html(
                pdf_id, page_no, pages[page_no], 
                prev_link, next_link, nav_data, 
                pdf_dir / f"{page_no}.html"
            )

    print(f"✅ Dashboard ready at: {vis_root / 'index.html'}")

if __name__ == "__main__":

    key = text.strip()
    if key in _TRANSLATION_CACHE:
        return _TRANSLATION_CACHE[key]
    
    if not ENABLE_TRANSLATION:
        return ""

    try:
        completion = client.chat.completions.create(
            model=MODEL_ID,
            messages=[
                {"role": "system", "content": "你是一个专业的翻译助手。请将以下英文翻译成中文，保持简洁准确，不要输出任何多余的解释。"},
                {"role": "user", "content": text}
            ],
            max_tokens=2048,
            temperature=0.3,
        )
        result = completion.choices[0].message.content.strip()
        _TRANSLATION_CACHE[key] = result
        return result
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"\n[Error Translating]: {e}")
        return "[Translation Failed]"

def parse_prompt_candidates(prompt_text: str) -> Dict[str, str]:
    candidates = {}
    lines = prompt_text.splitlines()
    for line in lines:
        line = line.strip()
        if not line or line.startswith("You are given") or line.startswith("Your output must"):
            continue
        match = re.match(r"^(TEXT\d+):\s*(.*)", line)
        if match:
            candidates[match.group(1)] = match.group(2)
    return candidates

def parse_model_response(response_text: str) -> Dict[str, str]:
    reasoning = {}
    text_body = re.sub(r"ANSWER:.*", "", response_text, flags=re.DOTALL | re.IGNORECASE)
    tokens = re.split(r"(TEXT\d+)", text_body)
    current_id = None
    for token in tokens:
        token = token.strip()
        if not token: continue
        if re.match(r"^TEXT\d+$", token):
            current_id = token
        else:
            if current_id:
                reasoning[current_id] = re.sub(r"^[:\-\.]\s*", "", token)
                current_id = None
    return reasoning

def get_final_answer_set(img_dir: Path) -> Set[str]:
    json_path = img_dir / "related_texts.json"
    s = set()
    if json_path.exists():
        try:
            data = json.load(open(json_path, "r", encoding="utf-8"))
            for item in data:
                if "id" in item: s.add(item["id"])
        except: pass
    return s

def scan_dataset(root: Path):
    """扫描目录并构建数据，同时进行翻译"""
    dataset = {}
    pdf_dirs = sorted([d for d in root.iterdir() if d.is_dir() and d.name not in [VIS_DIR_NAME, "vis", "vis_pro", "vis_ultimate"]])
    
    # 收集需要翻译的任务
    translation_tasks = []
    
    print("Scanning files...")
    for pdf_dir in pdf_dirs:
        pdf_id = pdf_dir.name
        dataset[pdf_id] = defaultdict(list)
        page_dirs = sorted(pdf_dir.glob("page_*"))
        
        for page_dir in page_dirs:
            page_no = page_dir.name
            img_dirs = sorted(page_dir.glob("img_*"))
            
            for img_dir in img_dirs:
                # Find image
                img_file = next((img_dir / f"image{ext}" for ext in [".jpg", ".png", ".jpeg"] if (img_dir/f"image{ext}").exists()), None)
                if not img_file: continue
                
                # Parse
                candidates = {}
                if (img_dir / "prompt.txt").exists():
                    candidates = parse_prompt_candidates((img_dir / "prompt.txt").read_text(encoding="utf-8", errors='ignore'))
                
                reasoning = {}
                raw_response = ""
                if (img_dir / "response.txt").exists():
                    raw_response = (img_dir / "response.txt").read_text(encoding="utf-8", errors='ignore')
                    reasoning = parse_model_response(raw_response)
                
                answer_set = get_final_answer_set(img_dir)
                all_ids = set(candidates.keys()) | set(reasoning.keys()) | answer_set
                sorted_ids = sorted(list(all_ids), key=lambda x: int(re.search(r"\d+", x).group()) if re.search(r"\d+", x) else 999)

                # 添加到待翻译列表
                for txt in candidates.values():
                    translation_tasks.append(txt)
                for txt in reasoning.values():
                    translation_tasks.append(txt)

                dataset[pdf_id][page_no].append({
                    "rel_img_path": os.path.relpath(img_file, root),
                    "candidates": candidates,
                    "reasoning": reasoning,
                    "answer_set": answer_set,
                    "sorted_ids": sorted_ids,
                    "raw_response": raw_response,
                    "img_name": img_dir.name
                })

    # 执行批量翻译
    if ENABLE_TRANSLATION and translation_tasks:
        print(f"Translating {len(translation_tasks)} items (cached items will be skipped)...")
        client = get_client()
        # 使用 set 去重，减少 API 调用
        unique_texts = list(set(translation_tasks))
        
        # 只翻译缓存里没有的
        to_translate = [t for t in unique_texts if t.strip() not in _TRANSLATION_CACHE]
        
        if to_translate:
            print(f"New texts to translate: {len(to_translate)}")
            for txt in tqdm(to_translate, desc="Translating"):
                translate_text(txt, client)
            # 保存缓存
            save_cache()
        else:
            print("All texts found in cache.")

    return dataset

<script>
    // --- Draggable Resizer ---
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {

        const rightPanel = document.querySelector('.panel-text');

            // Calculate percentage
            const containerRect = container.getBoundingClientRect();
            const x = e.clientX - containerRect.left;
            const percent = (x / containerRect.width) * 100;
            
            // Constraints (10% to 90%)
            if (percent > 10 && percent < 90) {
                leftPanel.style.flex = `0 0 ${percent}%`;
            }
        });

        document.addEventListener('mouseup', () => {
            if (isResizing) {

                resizer.classList.remove('dragging');
                document.body.style.cursor = 'default';
                container.style.userSelect = '';
            }
        });
    });

    // --- Image Pan & Zoom ---
    class ImageViewer {
        constructor(el) {
            this.container = el;
            this.content = el.querySelector('.pan-zoom-content');
            this.scale = 1;
            this.pointX = 0;
            this.pointY = 0;
            this.startX = 0;
            this.startY = 0;
            this.panning = false;
            this.initEvents();
        }

        initEvents() {
            this.container.addEventListener('wheel', (e) => {
                e.preventDefault();
                const delta = -e.deltaY;
                const factor = delta > 0 ? 1.1 : 0.9;
                this.scale *= factor;
                if (this.scale < 0.1) this.scale = 0.1;
                if (this.scale > 10) this.scale = 10;
                this.update();
            });

            this.container.addEventListener('mousedown', (e) => {
                this.panning = true;
                this.startX = e.clientX - this.pointX;
                this.startY = e.clientY - this.pointY;

def main():
    root = Path(OUTPUT_ROOT)
    vis_root = root / VIS_DIR_NAME
    
    # Init Cache
    load_cache()
    
    if vis_root.exists():
        shutil.rmtree(vis_root)
    vis_root.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    
    # 1. Scan & Translate
    dataset = scan_dataset(root)
    
    if not dataset:
        print("No data found.")
        return

    # Count total images for index
    total_imgs = sum(len(imgs) for p in dataset.values() for imgs in p.values())

    # 2. Generate Index
    print("Generating HTMLs...")
    generate_index_html(dataset, total_imgs, vis_root)
    
    # 3. Generate Detail Pages
    for pdf_id, pages in dataset.items():
        pdf_dir = vis_root / pdf_id
        pdf_dir.mkdir(exist_ok=True)
        sorted_pages = sorted(pages.keys())
        
        # Build Nav Data
        nav_data = []
        for p in sorted_pages:
            has_match = any(len(x['answer_set']) > 0 for x in pages[p])
            nav_data.append({
                'pdf': pdf_id, 'page': p, 
                'rel_link': f"{p}.html", 
                'has_match': has_match
            })

<script>
    // Tab Switching Logic
    function switchTab(index) {
        // Hide all subviews
        document.querySelectorAll('.subview').forEach(el => el.classList.remove('active'));
        // Show target
        const target = document.getElementById(`sv-${index}`);
        if(target) target.classList.add('active');
        
        // Update buttons
        document.querySelectorAll('.tab-btn').forEach(btn => btn.classList.remove('active'));
        document.getElementById(`tab-${index}`).classList.add('active');
        
        // Reset Zoom for new view
        if(window.viewers && window.viewers[index]) window.viewers[index].reset();
    }

    // Resizer Logic (Modified for Multi-View)
    const resizer = document.querySelector('.resizer'); // Note: This needs to target current visible one
    // We bind event generally, and find active elements
    document.addEventListener('mousedown', (e) => {
        if(e.target.classList.contains('resizer')) {
            window.isResizing = true;
            window.currentResizer = e.target;
            window.currentLeft = e.target.previousElementSibling;
            document.body.style.cursor = 'col-resize';
        }
    });
    
    document.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {
        if (!window.isResizing) return;
        const container = window.currentResizer.parentElement;
        const r = container.getBoundingClientRect();
        const p = ((e.clientX - r.left) / r.width) * 100;
        if (p > 10 && p < 90) window.currentLeft.style.flex = `0 0 ${p}%`;
    });
    
    document.addEventListener('mouseup', () => {
        window.isResizing = false;
        document.body.style.cursor = '';
    });

    // Pan & Zoom Logic
    class Viewer {
        constructor(el) {
            this.el = el;
            this.content = el.querySelector('.content');
            this.scale = 1; this.x = 0; this.y = 0;
            this.panning = false; this.sx = 0; this.sy = 0;
            
            el.addEventListener('wheel', e => {
                e.preventDefault();
                const f = e.deltaY > 0 ? 0.9 : 1.1;
                this.scale = Math.max(0.1, Math.min(10, this.scale * f));
                this.upd();
            });
            
            el.addEventListener('mousedown', e => {
                this.panning = true;
                this.sx = e.clientX - this.x;
                this.sy = e.clientY - this.y;
                el.style.cursor = 'grabbing';
            });
            
            window.addEventListener('mouseup', () => {
                this.panning = false;
                el.style.cursor = 'grab';
            });
            
            window.addEventListener('mousemove', e => {
                if(!this.panning) return;
                e.preventDefault();
                this.x = e.clientX - this.sx;
                this.y = e.clientY - this.sy;
                this.upd();
            });
        }
        zoom(f) { this.scale *= f; this.upd(); }
        reset() { this.scale=1; this.x=0; this.y=0; this.upd(); }
        upd() { this.content.style.transform = `translate(${this.x}px,${this.y}px) scale(${this.scale})`; }
    }
    
    // Init Viewers for all tabs
    window.viewers = [];
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
        document.querySelectorAll('.viewport').forEach((el, idx) => {

            if(e.key==='ArrowRight') document.getElementById('next')?.click();

                subview_style = "display:flex" if idx == 0 else "display:none"
                subviews.append(f"""
